name: Noise Compliance/ Tiếng ồn
introduction:

This indicator applies to the entire operational scope of Vietnam Airlines to ensure transparency, minimize negative impacts, and promote long-term development goals.

### 3. Significance
Plays a key role in shaping Vietnam Airlines' ESG strategy. It provides management with a basis for risk assessment, operational resource optimization, enhancing the sustainable national brand image, and meeting the requirements of investors, international partners, and regulatory bodies.

### 4. Management Approach
Data is managed through the VNA ESG software system. The process includes: Safety & Quality Dept declares or connects API automatically from source systems; the approval level verifies data accuracy; Planning & Development Dept and ESG Steering Committee monitor periodically via the overview dashboard.

### 5. Calculation Method
Based on expected analytical dimensions: Time: month / quarter / year (based on data update time) Tỷ lệ tiếng ồn theo chapter phân loại: %C3 = Số tàu có chứng nhận C3/ Tổng số tàu. %C4 = Số tàu có chứng nhận C4/ Tổng số tàu. %C14 = Số tàu có chứng nhận C14/ Tổng số tàu.. Calculation formulas comply with international standards, record data according to reporting cycles, and convert to standardized measurement units for comparison and annual reporting.

### 6. Conclusion

4. Internal management regulations of Vietnam Airlines Corporation.

name: Political contributions /Đóng góp cho các hoạt động chính trị
introduction:
### 1. Summary
Indicator GRI 415-1 - 'Political contributions /Đóng góp cho các hoạt động chính trị' is used to measure and monitor operational performance related to the topic 'Conduct & Compliance' at Vietnam Airlines. Data is collected from Nhập thủ công, managed by Tổ Thư ký, for reporting and assessing sustainability compliance.

### 2. Introduction
Indicator 'Political contributions /Đóng góp cho các hoạt động chính trị' (GRI 415-1) reflects the evaluation criteria under the Governance pillar according to global sustainability reporting guidelines such as GRI Standards and IATA ASRH. This indicator applies to the entire operational scope of Vietnam Airlines to ensure transparency, minimize negative impacts, and promote long-term development goals.

### 3. Significance
Plays a key role in shaping Vietnam Airlines' ESG strategy. It provides management with a basis for risk assessment, operational resource optimization, enhancing the sustainable national brand image, and meeting the requirements of investors, international partners, and regulatory bodies.

### 4. Management Approach
Data is managed through the VNA ESG software system. The process includes: Tổ Thư ký declares or connects API automatically from source systems; the approval level verifies data accuracy; Planning & Development Dept and ESG Steering Committee monitor periodically via the overview dashboard.

### 5. Calculation Method
Based on expected analytical dimensions: Chỉ báo cáo nội dung (text only). Calculation formulas comply with international standards, record data according to reporting cycles, and convert to standardized measurement units for comparison and annual reporting.

### 6. Conclusion
Maintaining and improving the index of indicator 'Political contributions /Đóng góp cho các hoạt động chính trị' directly contributes to the emission reduction roadmap, enhances customer experience, and optimizes internal governance systems at Vietnam Airlines towards NetZero by 2050.
